data:item.name: RW612FRDM Smart AirCon with WiFi and MQTT
data:item.display_title: RW612-FRDM Smart AirCon with Wi-Fi and MQTT
data:item.overview:
Smart AirCon demo based on the  RW612-FRDM board, featuring: 
  • MQTT communication over Wi-Fi.
  • Voice UI using NXP's voice intelligent technology (VIT) and VoiceSeeker.
  • Speech to Intent feature of VIT.Graphics using LVGL Open-Source library.
  • VoiceSeeker configuration with adaptive beamformer.
